# Toku Documentation

> Toku is the compliance layer for paying people in tokens and stablecoins. It handles token grants, contractor payments, and stablecoin payroll with built-in tax withholding, custody integration, and reporting.

## Getting Started
- [Home](https://docs.toku.com/): Documentation landing page and product overview
- [Overview](https://docs.toku.com/getting-started/overview): What Toku does and how to get started
- [Onboarding Checklist](https://docs.toku.com/getting-started/onboarding-checklist): Step-by-step setup guide for new clients
- [Key Concepts](https://docs.toku.com/getting-started/key-concepts): Core terminology and concepts used throughout Toku
- [Support](https://docs.toku.com/getting-started/support): How to contact the Toku support team

## Token Grant Administration (TGA)
- [TGA Overview](https://docs.toku.com/tga/overview): Manage token grants, vesting schedules, and distributions
- [Setting Up Your Account](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/setting-up-your-account): Configure TGA for your organization
- [Creating Grants](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/creating-grants): Issue token grants to employees, contractors, and investors
- [Managing Vesting Schedules](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/managing-vesting-schedules): Configure cliff, linear, milestone, or custom vesting
- [Token Distributions](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/token-distributions): Process and track token distributions to recipients
- [Reporting & Compliance](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/reporting-and-compliance): Generate reports for accounting and compliance
- [Cap Table Management](https://docs.toku.com/tga/client/cap-table-management): Track ownership and grants across your organization
- [Employee Portal](https://docs.toku.com/tga/user/employee-portal): View token grants and vesting status as a recipient
- [Viewing Your Grants](https://docs.toku.com/tga/user/viewing-your-grants): See grant details, vesting progress, and claim tokens
- [Understanding Vesting](https://docs.toku.com/tga/user/understanding-vesting): How vesting schedules work for grant recipients
- [Tax Documents](https://docs.toku.com/tga/user/tax-documents): Access tax forms related to token grants
- [TGA FAQ](https://docs.toku.com/tga/faq): Frequently asked questions about token grant administration

## Stablecoin Payroll
- [Payroll Overview](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/overview): Pay employees in stablecoins with built-in compliance
- [Enabling Stablecoin Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/client/enabling-stablecoin-payroll): Set up stablecoin payroll for your organization
- [Supported Stablecoins](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/client/supported-stablecoins): List of supported stablecoins and blockchain networks
- [Payroll Integration Setup](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/client/payroll-integration-setup): Connect Toku with your existing HRIS or payroll system
- [Running Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/client/running-payroll): Process stablecoin payroll for your employees
- [Payroll Reporting](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/client/reporting): View payroll reports and transaction history
- [Choosing Your Payout Method](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/user/choosing-payout-method): Select how you receive your compensation (fiat, stablecoin, or mix)
- [Setting Up Your Wallet](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/user/setting-up-wallet): Configure your crypto wallet for stablecoin payments
- [Understanding Your Payslip](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/user/understanding-payslip): Read your payslip with stablecoin and fiat breakdowns
- [Payroll FAQ](https://docs.toku.com/payroll/faq): Frequently asked questions about stablecoin payroll

## Contractor Payments
- [Contractor Overview](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/overview): Onboard and pay global contractors instantly
- [Onboarding Contractors](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/client/onboarding-contractors): Add contractors and generate compliant contracts
- [Managing Contractors](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/client/managing-contractors): Manage contractor profiles, contracts, and engagements
- [Payments & Invoicing](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/client/payments-and-invoicing): Process contractor payments and manage invoices
- [Compliance Basics](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/client/compliance-basics): Contractor classification and compliance requirements
- [Getting Started (Contractor)](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/user/getting-started): Set up your contractor account to receive payments
- [Submitting Invoices](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/user/submitting-invoices): Create and submit invoices for your work
- [Receiving Payments](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/user/receiving-payments): Track and receive contractor payments
- [Tax Information](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/user/tax-information): Manage tax forms and documentation as a contractor
- [Contractor FAQ](https://docs.toku.com/contractor/faq): Frequently asked questions about contractor payments

## Integrations
- [ADP Integration](https://docs.toku.com/integrations/adp): Connect Toku with ADP payroll
- [ADP Token Deduction](https://docs.toku.com/integrations/adp-token-deduction): Set up token deductions in ADP
- [ADP Export Employees](https://docs.toku.com/integrations/adp-export-employees): Export employee data from ADP to Toku
- [Workday Integration](https://docs.toku.com/integrations/workday): Connect Toku with Workday
- [UKG Integration](https://docs.toku.com/integrations/ukg): Connect Toku with UKG

## API Reference
- [Introduction](https://docs.toku.com/api/overview): What the Toku API is, what you can build, and how to get started
- [API Access](https://docs.toku.com/api/api-access): Get API keys, configure environments, and understand rate limits
- [Authentication](https://docs.toku.com/api/authentication): Authenticate API requests with API keys and handle auth errors
- [Idempotency](https://docs.toku.com/api/idempotency): Prevent duplicate operations with idempotency keys on retries
- [Dashboard](https://docs.toku.com/api/dashboard): Manage payroll, grants, contractors, and API keys from the web UI
- [Sandbox](https://docs.toku.com/api/sandbox): Test your integration with simulated data and sandbox API keys
- [Getting Started](https://docs.toku.com/api/getting-started): Make your first API call end-to-end
- [Get Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/get-payroll): Retrieve details for a specific payroll run
- [Get Org Payrolls](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/get-org-payrolls): List all payrolls for an organization
- [Create On-Cycle Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/create-on-cycle): Create a regular scheduled payroll
- [Create Off-Cycle Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/create-off-cycle): Create an off-cycle or bonus payroll
- [Update Exchange Rate](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/update-exchange-rate): Update the exchange rate for a payroll
- [Finalize Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/finalize): Finalize and approve a payroll for processing
- [Cancel Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/payroll/cancel): Cancel a draft or pending payroll
- [Get Employee](https://docs.toku.com/api/employees/get-employee): Retrieve employee details
- [Create Employee](https://docs.toku.com/api/employees/create-employee): Add a new employee record
- [Can Run Payroll](https://docs.toku.com/api/employees/can-run-payroll): Check if payroll can be run for an employee
- [Get Organization](https://docs.toku.com/api/organizations/get-org): Retrieve organization details
- [Get Organizations](https://docs.toku.com/api/organizations/get-orgs): List all organizations
- [Create Organization](https://docs.toku.com/api/organizations/create-org): Create a new organization
- [Get All Currencies](https://docs.toku.com/api/currencies/get-all): List all supported currencies
- [Get Currency by ID](https://docs.toku.com/api/currencies/get-by-id): Retrieve details for a specific currency
- [List Grant Configurations](https://docs.toku.com/api/grants/list-configurations): List available grant configurations
- [Add Single Grant](https://docs.toku.com/api/grants/add-single-grant): Create a new token grant
- [Create Grant for New Hire](https://docs.toku.com/api/grants/create-grant-for-new-hire): Create a grant as part of new hire onboarding
- [Add Wallet](https://docs.toku.com/api/wallets/add-wallet): Add a new wallet address for a recipient
- [Get Current Wallets](https://docs.toku.com/api/wallets/get-current-wallets): List active wallet addresses
- [Get Pending Wallets](https://docs.toku.com/api/wallets/get-pending-wallets): List wallets awaiting approval
- [Approve Wallet](https://docs.toku.com/api/wallets/approve-wallet): Approve a pending wallet address
- [Reject Wallet](https://docs.toku.com/api/wallets/reject-wallet): Reject a pending wallet address
- [Error Codes](https://docs.toku.com/api/errors): API error codes and troubleshooting
- [Rate Limits](https://docs.toku.com/api/rate-limits): API rate limiting policies
